The glycoprotein described here that functions as a lubricant and protector would be:
\boxed{A} Based on the detailed descriptions within the articles, particularly those related to mucous membrane physiology and tear film composition, mucin stands out as the key glycoprotein involved in lubrication and protection. Articles discussing the tear film detail how mucins contribute significantly to maintaining moisture and acting as a physical barrier, alongside playing roles similar to those seen in saliva regarding protection and lubrication.
